Environment_or_Treatment_Factor.reason: The paper explicitly used Bemisia tabaci infestation at 12, 24, 48 h and 2-week infestation after VIGS.

Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene.reason: All three points are supported: induction after infestation, increased susceptibility after silencing, and reduced WRKY40/ERF1/JAZ1/AOC4 expression after silencing.
